purpose: Exhaustively test all subsets of the six established quadratic directions removed by the conventional Kane reduction and determine whether a lower-dimensional extension can reproduce the validated complete-space CdTe matrix signal before introducing any new computation or analytical parameterization.
claim_boundary: This gate measures reduction error relative to the validated complete ten-dimensional static CdTe quadratic projection in repository normalization. It does not establish standard Weiler parameter values, converged material coefficients, uniqueness beyond the tested subset family, finite-temperature behavior, or authorization for new electronic-structure, phonon, HgTe, or alloy calculations.
